name: skillsagents
description: Install AI agents and skills into your project in seconds

scripts.embed:status: node -e "require('dotenv').config();const{query}=require('./src/db.js');query('SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(embedding) as indexed FROM skills').then(r=>console.log('Total:',r.rows[0].total,'Indexadas:',r.rows[0].indexed)).then(()=>process.exit(0))"
